'''dab챦fd챦f''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycothrix|mycothrix]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-b-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycothrix|mycothrix]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| dab챦fd챦f
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦fth|dab챦fd챦fth]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦fj|dab챦fd챦fj]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦fsh|dab챦fd챦fsh]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f|dab챦fd챦f]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || [[word:dab챦fb챦fd챦fth|dab챦fb챦fd챦fth]] || [[word:dab챦fb챦fd챦fj|dab챦fb챦fd챦fj]] || [[word:dab챦fb챦fd챦fsh|dab챦fb챦fd챦fsh]] || [[word:dab챦fb챦fd챦f|dab챦fb챦fd챦f]]
|}

''8 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦f|dab챦fd챦f챦f]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦f|dab챦fd챦f챦f]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦f|dab챦fd챦f챦f]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦f|dab챦fd챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦fth|dab챦fd챦fth]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦fj|dab챦fd챦fj]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦fsh|dab챦fd챦fsh]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f|dab챦fd챦f]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦fl|dab챦fd챦f챦fl]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦fl|dab챦fd챦f챦fl]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦fl|dab챦fd챦f챦fl]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦fl|dab챦fd챦f챦fl]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦f챦f|dab챦fd챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦f챦f|dab챦fd챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦f챦f|dab챦fd챦f챦f챦f]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦f챦f|dab챦fd챦f챦f챦f]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦fn|dab챦fd챦f챦fn]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦fn|dab챦fd챦f챦fn]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦fn|dab챦fd챦f챦fn]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦fn|dab챦fd챦f챦fn]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦foro|dab챦fd챦f챦foro]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦foro|dab챦fd챦f챦foro]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦foro|dab챦fd챦f챦foro]] || [[word:dab챦fd챦f챦foro|dab챦fd챦f챦foro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Words a3ddb2a]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
[[Category:Words 5bad82d]]
{{wordpage|270c81a}}
